summary: React.lazy + Suspense lazy loading v90.3.0 - Iteration 191 PASSED. All 11 backend tests passed, all 17 frontend UI tests passed. 17 components converted from eager to lazy loading. Core components (LoginPage, Dashboard, Payments, MillingTracker, CashBook, ErrorBoundary, EntryTable) remain eagerly loaded for instant switching. Heavy tabs (Reports, Settings, GovtRegisters, Staff, Hemali, MillParts, Vouchers, FYSummary, DCTracker) are lazy loaded. APP_VERSION extracted to separate file to prevent eager loading of WhatsNew (2377 lines). LazyFallback shows Loader2 spinner + 'Loading...' text.
context_for_next_testing_agent: React.lazy + Suspense lazy loading v90.3.0 verified. Key changes: (1) 17 components converted to lazy loading using React.lazy() and Suspense. (2) Eager components: LoginPage, Dashboard, Payments, MillingTracker, CashBook, ErrorBoundary, EntryTable, AppHeader. (3) Lazy components: Reports, DCTracker, Ledgers, MillPartsStock, StaffManagement, FYSummaryDashboard, BalanceSheet, Vouchers, HemaliPayment, GovtRegisters, Settings, VehicleWeight, AutoWeightEntries, PaddyPurchaseRegister, WhatsNew. (4) APP_VERSION extracted to /app/frontend/src/utils/constants-version.js to prevent eager loading of WhatsNew module. (5) LazyFallback component shows Loader2 spinner with 'Loading...' text during lazy load.
